languages.text: "Конечно, Ваша Светлость. Для меня большая честь вручить вам эту древнюю вещь".
"Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, Ваша Светлость. Для меня большая честь вручить вам эту древнюю вещь".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."
"Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

languages.text: 「もちろんです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。第三召集および私を代表して、この遺物を贈呈いたします」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. On behalf of the Third Call-Up and myself, I grant you this artefact as a gift."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろんです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。第三召集および私を代表して、この遺物を贈呈いたします。」

languages.text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. C'est un grand honneur de vous donner cette relique. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. C'est un grand honneur de vous donner cette relique. »

languages.text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu kadim yadigârı size vermek büyük bir onurdur."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bu kadim yadigârı size vermek büyük bir onurdur."

languages.text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Euch dieses alte Relikt zu überlassen, ist eine große Ehre."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Euch dieses alte Relikt zu überlassen, ist eine große Ehre."

languages.text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es un gran honor entregarle esta antigua reliquia».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es un gran honor entregarle esta antigua reliquia».

languages.text: “当然，舰长大人。能将这件圣物献给您，是莫大的荣幸。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. To give this ancient relic to you is a great honour."

traits.locale_text: “当然，舰长大人。能将这件圣物献给您，是莫大的荣幸。”
